IIT Delhi · Design for Sustainability

Where Fallen
Leaves Bloom
Again

Le-Patte turns discarded dry leaves into beautiful, fully biodegradable flower pots — made with nothing but rice starch and eggshell powder. Zero plastic. Zero synthetics. Pure nature.

🌿 100% Biodegradable 🍃 Dry Leaves + Rice Starch ♻️ Zero Waste 🥚 Eggshell Fertiliser

The Problem We're Solving

Nature Is Being Hurt
From Both Sides

Every autumn, two crises collide — one in the air, one underfoot. Both have the same root cause: we never designed a better alternative.

🔥

Leaf Burning

Fallen dry leaves are routinely burned across India's streets, parks, and campuses — releasing toxic particulates, carbon monoxide, and smoke that contributes directly to severe seasonal air pollution crises.

🪣

Plastic Pots

Conventional plastic planters are non-biodegradable. Once discarded, they persist in landfills for hundreds of years, leaching microplastics into soil and water. India alone discards millions annually.

💡

The Gap — Until Now

A low-cost, fully natural, and scalable alternative that addresses both problems simultaneously was simply missing. Le-Patte fills that gap by turning the very waste causing pollution into the solution itself.

Our Solution

A Pot That Gives Back
More Than It Takes

The Le-Patte flower pot doesn't just hold plants — it nourishes the earth as it returns to it. Every ingredient was chosen because nature already made it perfect.

🌍

100% Biodegradable

Zero synthetic materials. When the pot's life is over, it breaks down naturally, returning nutrients to the soil rather than clogging a landfill for centuries.

💨

Pollution Reduced

Every pot made is a pile of leaves saved from being burned. We divert leaf waste directly from open-air burning, cutting harmful particulate and carbon emissions at the source.

♻️

Waste Upcycled

Dry leaves are abundant, free, and endlessly renewable. What was dismissed as seasonal nuisance becomes a functional, beautiful, marketable product.

🥚

Soil Enriched

Eggshell powder adds natural calcium to the mix. As the pot biodegrades it acts as a slow-release fertiliser — improving soil quality and feeding your plants from the outside in.

💰

Low-Cost Alternative

Dry leaves are free. Rice starch is a kitchen byproduct. Eggshells are food waste. Le-Patte proves that sustainability doesn't require expensive materials — only better thinking.

🇮🇳

Rooted in India

Conceived and crafted at IIT Delhi, Le-Patte draws on India's deep tradition of working with nature. The name, the font, the materials — all reflect this cultural bond with the earth.

The Three-Ingredient Formula

Dry Leaves (Base Material) Rice Starch (Natural Binder) Eggshell Powder (Fertiliser)

"Reduce waste, reuse nature, and regrow the future."

The Product

The Most Unique Pot
for Your Garden

Made from just three ingredients found in nature and your kitchen — dry leaves, rice starch, and eggshell powder — Le-Patte is as beautiful as it is responsible.

🌿 100% Biodegradable ✅ 100% Natural 💰 Low-Cost Alternative ♻️ Waste Converted 🚫 No Harmful Chemicals 💨 Pollution Reduced

See How It's Made

Innovation by

IIT Delhi

The Journey to Zero Synthetics

Four Stages.
One Breakthrough.

Every failed batch taught us something. Every prototype pushed us closer to a formula that was truly, uncompromisingly natural.

📄

Stage 01 — Foundation

Paper Mâché: Learning to Mould

The first prototype used paper pulp and cardboard pulp, mixed with Fevicol (a synthetic adhesive), corn flour, and olive oil. It proved the pot shape was achievable — a critical first win. But Fevicol is synthetic. The sustainability goal demanded we go further.

⚠ Limitation: Synthetic binders used
🍂

Stage 02 — The Pivot

Dry Leaves: The Right Material

Paper was swapped for dry leaves — boiled to soften, finely chopped, then mixed with Fevicol and corn flour. Pressed into an oiled mould and dried, they formed a genuinely stable pot, proving leaves were not just usable, but ideal.

⚠ Still reliant on Fevicol as binder
🌸

Stage 03 — Experimenting with Nutrition

Flower Petals + Eggshells: Adding Life

Bougainvillea petals showed superior strength. More importantly, eggshell powder emerged as a brilliant additive — providing natural calcium that enriches soil as the pot degrades. A key insight was born that carried through to the final formula.

✓ Eggshell powder retained in final formula
🌱

Final Prototype — The Breakthrough

Rice Starch: Zero Synthetics Achieved

Fevicol was eliminated entirely. Boiled rice water proved to be a surprisingly effective natural binder when combined with finely chopped dry leaves and eggshell powder. The result: a fully biodegradable, 100% natural flower pot with absolutely no synthetic chemicals.

✓ 100% Natural · Zero Synthetics · Fully Biodegradable

Get Yours Today

Order Your Le-Patte

Each pot is handcrafted from fallen leaves at IIT Delhi. Simple, natural, and ready to grow something beautiful.

🌱 100% Natural

The Innovators

Meet the Minds
Behind Le-Patte

Five students from IIT Delhi who refused to accept leaf burning as inevitable — and built a better future from the ground up.

asheeshkumar.iitd@gmail.com 📧 Send email
Le-Patte

An eco-friendly brand born at IIT Delhi — recycling dry leaves into beautiful, 100% biodegradable flower pots. "Le" means take. "Patte" means leaves. Together, we give fallen things a new life.


A Sustainable Innovation · Design for Sustainability · IIT Delhi

Explore
  • The Problem
  • Our Solution
  • The Product
  • How It's Made

  • 📧 asheeshkumar.iitd@gmail.com

  • 📋 Contact Us
पत्तों की पुकार
गिरे पत्ते बोले धीरे,
"हममें भी है जीवन जीरे।
कचरा समझकर मत ठुकराओ,
हमसे ही तुम थाल बनाओ।"

Le-Patte का ये संदेश,
हरियाली में छुपा है देश।
न प्लास्टिक, न कोई भार,
प्रकृति ही है असली उपहार।

एक कदम तुम आगे बढ़ाओ,
धरती को फिर से मुस्कुराओ।
छोटे-छोटे कर्म निभाओ,
हरा भविष्य आज बनाओ।
